title: Superetro 3 Retro Card Games
features: Pack of 3 classic card games with vintage style designs
Retro style card games ideal to take on family holidays and long trips. Play 3 family favourites in a handy travel size
Fun for all ages, quick and easy games to play. Each game comes with its own box instructions card.
Introduce friends and family to the delights of Snap, Old Maid, and Donkey.
description: Product Description This fabulous set of 3 retro card games is perfectly sized for little hands to learn and play Each card pack has its own box and set of instructions Great to take away on your travels Why not pop a pack into a party bag to spread the fun?! Safety Warning Choking Hazard. Small parts. Not for children under 3 years.
